'''''Etherhawk''''' was a [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class corvette]] of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]].

An old ship by [[7 ABY/Legends|7.5 ABY]], ''Etherhawk'' was assigned to Group One of [[Solo Fleet]] in the hunt for [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]. Ships of this class had the capacity to carry one squadron of starfighters, though Etherhawk was not known to carry any.

{{Ship-stub}}
